majorcan-almond-cake.name: Majorcan Almond Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a loaf pan or wide casserole dish and sprinkle with breadcrumbs.

Beat eggs in a large bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Add sugar and beat in well. Stir in almonds and continue beating until batter is well combined. Add lemon juice, cinnamon, and rum, one after the other, beating until well combined. Pour batter into the prepared pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out with a few moist crumbs attached, 40 to 50 minutes. Cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes. Run a table knife around the edges to loosen. Invert carefully onto a serving plate or cooling rack. Let cool completely.

make-this-moroccan-bread-step-by-step-co.name: Make This Moroccan Bread, Step By Step.

Then you'll add his butter and integrate them little by little till they sign up.
At this point, you're going to incorporate the yeast mix that you did and we mix up till you get perfectly integrated. At this point, your dough will be a little sandy.
We will add water to his eye a few percent and we will mix very well until we get a smooth and smooth texture.
The secret is to put some water into water and to amass perfectly and for a good while till your mass is well integrated and sponge.
Once your dough's even, you'll make it a little something, that's to say give it an elongated but fat shape. Cover with a wet cloth and let rest for 10 minutes.
After that time, you'll divide mass into portions of the same size. That's about 10 0 12. It proceeds to make the balls well round.
Filling up your counter or table and put every ball of dough apart. You're gonna smash them with the yolks of your fingers and leave them flattened but keeping their shape round.
We'll put the balls on an oven plate with paper and kitchen. We'll put up the loaves and put them with a fork. Cover them with a moist cloth and you'll let them stand for 45 more minutes.
After that time, bake at 200 ° C till the loaves are golden on the surface. Can be from 15 to 20 minutes or less. It will depend on your oven, so you have to be outstanding.
Once the loaves are golden, you'll get them out and leave them to rest and they'll be ready to consume.
Enjoy them!

mango-and-lime-mousse-teleculinaria.name: Mango And Lime Mousse
instructions: Numa tigela, misture o leite condensado com o sumo de lima e leve ao frio durante 10 minutos.

In the meantime, whip the cream into whipped cream real tight. After the time indicated, gently wrap them with the condensed milk mixture and the mango puree, without completely mixing the preparations.
Paste some lime slices inside a glass glass, pour the mousse, decorate with more lime slices and take to the cold until serving.

mango-lime-spritzer.name: Mango-lime Spritzer

ingredients.prep: peeled, cut into pieces (8–10 oz. flesh)
sparkling water, and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: Combine 1 large ripe mango, peeled, cut into pieces, 6 sprigs mint, leaves picked, coarsely chopped, and ¼ tsp. kosher salt in a large mortar and pestle or a food processor and pound (or pulse) until mostly smooth. Stir in 3 Tbsp. honey and 2 Tbsp. fresh lime juice. Taste and adjust with more honey or lime juice as needed (mixture should be very sweet and punchy; remember, it will get diluted with sparkling water).
Place some Tajín on a small plate.

To make 1 drink, moisten half of rim of a 10–12-oz. glass with lime juice, then dip in Tajín to coat. Spoon 3 Tbsp. mango mixture into glass, fill with ice, and top off with 6 oz. sparkling water. Garnish with a lime wedge.

mangu-con-los-tres-golpes.name: Mangú Con Los Tres Golpes
instructions: Place the sliced onions in a medium bowl with a heavy pinch of salt and vinegar. Let soak while preparing the other ingredients, about 1 hour.

Peel the plantains and cut into quarters. Place the plantains in a large pot with enough water to cover them by 1 inch (2 cm). Add salt to taste. Bring the plantains to a boil over high heat and cook until they are very tender, about 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, in a medium skillet, heat the canola oil to 177°C (180°C) over high heat.

Coat each slice of Dominican frying cheese in flour, and then place the slices in 1¾ cups (420 ML) canola oil and fry until both sides are golden brown, about 3 minutes. Remove from skillet and transfer to a paper towel-lined plate.
Add another tablespoon of oil to the skillet and fry the salami until brown and crispy on both sides, 4 minutes. Remove from the skillet, transfer to a paper towel-lined plate.
Wipe out the skillet, and add another tablespoon of oil to the pan. Pour in the onions and their soaking liquid. Sauté until the onions are soft and bright pink, about 10 minutes.
Once the plantains are tender, scoop them out from the water and place in a separate large bowl, and keep the starchy boiling liquid warm on the stove.
Add the butter and about 1 cup (240 ml) of the hot starchy plantain liquid. Mash the cooked plantains together until it is creamy and smooth. Add more liquid as needed.
Serve the mangú with the fried cheese, fried salami, avocado, and fried eggs. Garnish with pickled onions.
Enjoy!

maple-cinnamon-ham-glaze.name: Maple Cinnamon Ham Glaze
instructions: Stir brown sugar and cinnamon together in a bowl until well combined. Pour in maple syrup and stir until smooth.

maple-ice-cream.name: Maple Ice Cream
instructions: Whisk 1/2 cup maple syrup and egg yolks together in a medium bowl. Set aside.
Combine remaining 1/2 cup maple syrup, half-and-half, cream, and salt in a medium saucepan. Heat over medium-high heat, stirring often, until simmering. Reduce heat to medium.

Whisk about 1/2 cup hot cream mixture into egg yolk mixture, whisking constantly to prevent scrambling the eggs. Whisk 1/2 cup more hot cream mixture into egg yolk mixture, whisking constantly. Pour egg yolk mixture back into the saucepan, stirring constantly with a heatproof spatula. Cook, stirring constantly, until custard thickens and coats the back of the spatula, 1 to 2 minutes. Remove from heat.
Fill a large bowl with ice and cold water; set aside.

Strain custard through a fine-mesh sieve set over a clean bowl. Whisk in vanilla extract. Set the bowl into the prepared ice bath; stir occasionally until custard cooled to room temperature, 15 to 30 minutes.
Remove the bowl from the ice bath, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate for 2 to 4 hours, or overnight.

Pour custard into an ice cream maker and churn according to manufacturer's instructions until it reaches the consistency of soft serve. Serve right away or cover tightly with plastic wrap and freeze until firm.

marinara-sauce-yet.name: Marinara Sauce Yet
instructions: Place tomatoes, tomato paste, parsley, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper in a food processor; blend until smooth.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and cook until slightly softened, about 2 minutes.
Stir in blended tomato sauce and white wine.
Simmer, stirring occasionally, until sauce has thickened, about 30 minutes.

marinated-tuna-recipe-comedera.name: Marinated Tuna Recipe

mascarpone-zucchini-pizza.name: Mascarpone Zucchini Pizza
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Fry the zucchini in the oil until golden brown, 5 to 8 minutes on each side. Remove from heat and set aside.
Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Spray an 8-inch pizza pan with cooking spray.

Combine the flour, yeast, sugar, and salt in a bowl. Slowly stir in the vegetable oil and warm water. Knead the dough until well blended. On a floured surface, roll the dough out with a rolling pin to fit the prepared pizza pan. Roll the crust thin, and fold over the edges to form a rim. Spread the pizza sauce over the dough, and sprinkle the mozzarella cheese on top. Arrange the zucchini slices over the cheese.

Bake in the preheated oven until the cheese is melted and the crust is browned, about 15 minutes. Spoon dollops of mascarpone cheese over the pizza. The cheese will melt onto the pizza and spread naturally. Allow the pizza to cool for 5 to 10 minutes before slicing and serving.

miso-honey-dressing.name: Miso Honey Dressing
instructions: Place soy sauce, miso paste, lemon juice, rice wine vinegar, garlic, ginger, and red chile paste in a food processor or blender; begin processing on low speed. Keeping the processor running, slowly stream honey into the food processor until smooth. Slowly stream sesame oil into mixture until evenly combined. Slowly stream olive oil into the food processor until dressing is smooth.

miso-mayo-chicken-bowl.name: Miso-mayo Chicken Bowl

ingredients.prep: white and pale green  parts only, sliced  0.25" thick

ingredients.item: Steamed jasmine rice and toasted sesame seeds

instructions: Place a rack in upper third of oven; preheat to 425°. Whisk 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, ½ cup mayonnaise, and 3 Tbsp. white miso in a large bowl to combine. Add 1½ lb. skinless, boneless chicken thighs (about 6), patted dry, and turn to coat.

Place 2 small leeks or 1 large leek,  white and pale green  parts only, sliced ¼" thick, and 1 lb. brussels sprouts, trimmed, quartered lengthwise, on a rimmed baking sheet. Drizzle with extra-virgin olive oil and season generously with kosher salt; toss to coat. Arrange chicken on top and roast until vegetables are slightly tender, 13–16 minutes.
Heat broiler (leave baking sheet in oven). Broil until vegetables are tender and charred in spots and chicken is cooked through and well-browned in spots, 9–12 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk 1 Tbsp. unseasoned rice vinegar, remaining ¼ cup mayonnaise, and remaining 1 Tbsp. white miso in a small bowl. Set miso-mayo aside.

To serve, transfer chicken to a cutting board and coarsely chop. Drizzle remaining 2 Tbsp. unseasoned rice vinegar over brussels sprouts and leeks on baking sheet and toss to coat. Divide steamed jasmine rice evenly among bowls and top with brussels sprouts and leeks, then chopped chicken. Drizzle reserved miso-mayo over and sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds.

mississippi-sin.name: Mississippi Sin
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).
Cut top off bread loaf; keep top in one piece, and reserve for later use. Hollow out loaf to make room for filling; chop hollowed out bread for dipping.

Combine Cheddar cheese, ham, sour cream, cream cheese, green onions, green chiles, and jalapeños in a bowl; spoon into hollowed bread loaf. Top loaf with reserved bread top; wrap loaf with 2 pieces aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven until filling is cooked through and bubbling, about 1 hour 20 minutes.

mixed-grill-of-sausages-teleculinaria.name: Mixed Grill Of Sausages

Cut the cake in half or in three slices, fill it with a part of the cream and cover it with the remaining cream. Serve fresh, sprinkled with cocoa powder and decorated with coffee beans.

11. 11. 11. 11. Internal of pizzan volovans; fill the healing.
12. If necessary, again look at 2–3 minutes and warm service.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

20-minute-basil-chicken-tomato-rice.name: 20-minute Basil, Chicken ' Tomato Rice

ingredients.item: Uncle ben's® flavor infusions chicken & herb rice

instructions: Heat olive oil in large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chicken strips and cook until they are just done (4 to 6 minutes).
Add onion, red pepper slices, and fresh garlic.
Continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until vegetables barely tender (4 to 5 minutes).
Add water, tomatoes, and rice.
Cover pan and continue cooking until mixture just comes to a boil.
Reduce heat to medium low and continue cooking until rice is tender or liquid is absorbed (about 10 minutes).
Remove cover; stir in basil leaves and Parmesan cheese. Refrigerate leftovers.

5-minute-vegan-pesto.name: 5-minute Vegan Pesto
instructions: Combine basil leaves, olive oil, pine nuts, nutritional yeast, garlic, salt, and black pepper in the bowl of a food processor; pulse until smooth.
